description: This file contains unit tests for the Button component, testing its initialization, toggling behavior, disposal, and integration with jQuery mock, as well as verifying static properties like VERSION and DATA_KEY.

methods.name: beforeAll
methods.description: Sets up the fixture element before all tests.

methods.name: afterEach
methods.description: Clears the fixture after each test.

methods.name: it
methods.description: Defines individual test cases for Button behavior, such as element handling, version, data key, toggle, dispose, jQuery interface, and instance retrieval.
